name: Total Care Chiropractic
tagline: Gentle, experienced chiropractic care in downtown Santa Rosa
seoDescription: Total Care Chiropractic in Santa Rosa, CA is the practice of Dr. Todd M. Wright, DC — a chiropractor with 35+ years of experience treating back pain, neck pain, headaches, and auto-injury recovery. 5.0-star rated.

sections.heading: Relief that lasts, from a chiropractor who has seen it all
sections.subheading: Total Care Chiropractic is the Santa Rosa practice of Dr. Todd M. Wright, DC — more than 35 years of hands-on experience helping patients move past back pain, neck pain, and the lingering effects of injury.
badges: Dr. Todd M. Wright, DC — practicing since 1990

sections.heading: Experience you can feel in the first visit
sections.intro: Patients come to Dr. Wright because the care is unhurried, precise, and built around what is actually causing their pain.

items.title: 35+ years of experience
items.body: Dr. Wright has practiced chiropractic since graduating from National College of Chiropractic in 1990 — decades of hands-on experience with the spine and nervous system.

items.title: Care tailored to your pain
items.body: From everyday back and neck pain to headaches and post-accident recovery, treatment is focused on the specific area that needs adjustment, not a one-size-fits-all routine.

items.title: By appointment, no waiting room rush
items.body: An appointment-based practice means a calm visit and a doctor who has time for you — which is exactly what patients mention in their reviews.

sections.heading: Chiropractic care for the pain that slows you down

items.title: Back Pain
items.description: Targeted spinal adjustments to relieve lower and upper back pain and restore comfortable movement.

items.title: Neck Pain
items.description: Gentle, precise care for neck stiffness and pain — including the kind that follows poor posture or injury.

items.title: Headaches
items.description: Many patients see Dr. Wright for chronic headaches, including long-standing pain traced back to old injuries.

items.title: Auto & Injury Recovery
items.description: Support through the healing process after a car accident or other injury, with care focused on the source of the pain.

items.title: Spinal Adjustments
items.description: Hands-on chiropractic adjustments to keep the spine aligned and the nervous system working as it should.

items.title: Spinal Decompression
items.description: Decompression therapy to ease pressure on the spine and the nerves around it.

sections.heading: The same trusted doctor, visit after visit
sections.body: At Total Care Chiropractic you see Dr. Wright himself — not a rotating roster. That continuity is why patients describe care that gets to the root of the problem and a doctor who knows exactly where they need adjustment.
points: Doctor of Chiropractic, National College of Chiropractic (1990)
Licensed in California for over three decades

sections.heading: What patients say about Dr. Wright

items.quote: Dr. Wright is working wonders helping me with my concussion and neck pain. He is second to none.
The doctor knows exactly where I need adjustment and how to make the headaches go away.
Best care possible — a caring, professional doctor and staff. Dr. Todd has cured my back aches for years.

sections.heading: Ready to feel better?
sections.body: Total Care Chiropractic is at 1203 4th St in downtown Santa Rosa. Call (707) 545-2105 to request an appointment.

sections.heading: Your visit, step by step
sections.intro: Working with Total Care Chiropractic is straightforward from the first call.

items.title: Call to schedule
items.body: Reach the office at (707) 545-2105. Total Care is an appointment-based practice, so you'll get a time that works for you.

items.title: Dr. Wright assesses
items.body: He listens to your history and pinpoints what is actually causing the pain — not just where you feel it.

items.title: Targeted treatment
items.body: You receive hands-on adjustments and care tailored to your condition, explained clearly along the way.

items.title: Ongoing relief
items.body: Many patients return for periodic care that keeps them moving comfortably for years.

items.a: Yes — Total Care Chiropractic is an appointment-based practice. Call (707) 545-2105 to schedule a time.
Common reasons patients visit include back pain, neck pain, headaches, and recovery after an auto accident or other injury.
Dr. Todd M. Wright has been a practicing Doctor of Chiropractic since 1990 — more than 35 years of experience.
We're at 1203 4th St in downtown Santa Rosa, CA 95404.

sections.heading: Let's get you out of pain
sections.body: Call (707) 545-2105 or request an appointment at 1203 4th St, Santa Rosa.

sections.heading: Three decades of caring for Santa Rosa
sections.subheading: A downtown chiropractic practice built on experience, continuity, and care that gets to the root of the problem.

sections.heading: The practice of Dr. Todd M. Wright, DC
body: Total Care Chiropractic is the downtown Santa Rosa practice of Dr. Todd M. Wright, DC. A graduate of National College of Chiropractic in 1990, Dr. Wright has spent more than 35 years caring for the spine, joints, and nervous system — and the people attached to them.

Over those decades, patients have come to him for back pain, neck pain, stubborn headaches, and recovery after car accidents and other injuries. What keeps them coming back is the same thing they write in their reviews: a doctor who finds the real source of the pain, explains it plainly, and a friendly, professional office that makes scheduling easy.
highlights: Dr. Todd M. Wright, DC — practicing since 1990
Doctor of Chiropractic, National College of Chiropractic
Licensed in California for over 30 years

sections.heading: You see the doctor, every time
sections.body: At many clinics you never know who you'll get. At Total Care, you see Dr. Wright himself — the same experienced hands, visit after visit. That continuity is the difference patients notice most.
points: One trusted doctor, not a rotating roster
Care focused on the cause, not just the symptom

sections.heading: Visit Total Care Chiropractic
sections.blurb: Find us at 1203 4th St, Santa Rosa, CA 95404, or call (707) 545-2105 to request an appointment. Total Care is an appointment-based practice.
